about.label: [ + ] A BIT MORE ABOUT ME
about.bio1: Hey — I'm Corneliu Secrieri, a developer & designer based in Vienna. I work solo at co-studio — websites, apps, graphics, video. Modern minimalism, sometimes deliberately complex.
about.bio2: Born in Romania, grew up there and in Austria. When I'm not shipping React, WordPress, or Swift / Expo projects, I'm making music, editing video, or hunting decent coffee. co-studio is my playground for tech and sound — code meets craft ツ

medicare.title: Medicare
medicare.desc: Mobile app — product build under co-studio, from concept to shipped experience.

cobible.title: co.bible
cobible.desc: Native iOS Bible app in Swift — multiple translations, active reading and quiz duels against others to become the top player.

priconnect.desc: Cross-platform app — React Native & Expo (hybrid) for iOS and Android from one codebase.

vsmannersdorf.title: VS Mannersdorf
vsmannersdorf.desc: Modern React website for the primary school Mannersdorf am Leithagebirge (Lower Austria) — React + Vite, CSS Modules, no component library.

about_page.bio: I'm Corneliu Secrieri — developer, designer, and video editor running co-studio solo from Vienna. I build websites (WordPress & React), apps (Swift, Expo, Ionic), graphics (logos, flyers, posters), and video with VFX when the project calls for it.
about_page.p1: It started with my first computer — taking things apart, putting them back together, and figuring out how they tick. Long before HTL, I was already tinkering, breaking, and fixing.
about_page.p2: Born in Romania, I spent my childhood there, then completed my entire school path in Austria — ending with HTL for IT. Alongside school I ran private projects and classic village IT support: Windows installs, drivers, software — the real-world helpdesk.
about_page.p3: Today I love modern, minimal interfaces — but I'm not afraid of complex layouts when the story needs it. Stack-wise you'll find me in React, Angular, WordPress, Swift, Expo, Python, Java, SQL, Docker, and more.
about_page.p4: co-studio (founded 2026) is my personal studio for everything that excites me — client work, own apps, design, video, and long-term: music production under the same roof. Tech studio by day, sound lab by night.

exp1.desc: My own studio — web, apps, graphics, video. Projects that matter to me and clients who care about craft.

exp2.desc: HTL informatics, side projects with school knowledge, WordPress/React experiments, first real client work.

exp3.desc: First PC, pre-HTL hacking, IT support for people in my village — installs, drivers, troubleshooting.

liability_content.p: Contents of this website were created with care. No guarantee for completeness, accuracy, or timeliness. Obligation to remove or block use of information under general laws remains unaffected.

liability_links.p: This site contains links to external websites. I have no influence on their content and assume no liability. The respective provider is responsible for linked pages.

copyright.p: Content and works on this site are subject to Austrian copyright law. Reproduction, editing, or distribution requires written consent of Corneliu Secrieri unless otherwise stated.

overview.p: I take the protection of your personal data seriously. This policy explains what data may be processed when you visit this website and how you can exercise your rights under the GDPR.

hosting.p: When you access the site, the hosting provider may process technical data (e.g. IP address, browser type, time of access) in server logs for security and operation. Legal basis: legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

contact.p: If you contact me by email, phone, or the contact form, I process the data you provide to handle your request. The form is delivered via Web3Forms (Web3Forms Inc.) to my email address. For appointments you may use my booking page (Google Ireland Ltd.). Legal basis: pre-contractual measures / contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) or legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

cookies.p: We use only technically necessary storage: your language choice is saved locally in the browser (localStorage, key i18nextLng). We do not use marketing, analytics, or third-party tracking cookies. You can delete stored data at any time in your browser settings. A short notice appears once on first visit.

rights.p: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection. You may lodge a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority (dsb.gv.at). Contact me at the address above for any request.

changes.p: This policy may be updated. The current version is always available on this page. Last updated: 2026.
